concept: Picture a game where you're a chronologically displaced architect redesigning historical buildings that have become unstable in time. Reinforce structural elements across different time periods where the same building exists in various states—construction, prime, decay, and ruin—with changes in one era affecting all others. Navigate the social and political complications of each time period while making your alterations as inconspicuous as possible to avoid changing history. Gradually realize that the temporal instability of these landmarks is connected to your own mysterious origins outside conventional timeflow.
